overview: Bluefin Tuna is a Normal-class Beast monster found in Ship Graveyard. 1 grades: Common. Base stats (Common): 50 HP, 0 physical damage, 350 move speed, ActionSpeed 0. ImpactResistance 3, MaxImpactEndurance 4. 0 attacks, 0 combo chains.

combo_flow.description: This monster does not use combo chains. Each attack is selected independently by the AI.

strategies.title: Very Fast — 350 Move Speed
strategies.description: Base move speed of 350 makes this one of the fastest monsters. Outrunning it is difficult.

ai_perception.damage_description: Reacts to damage from any direction.
